title: ood as my body attempted to kill me &amp the mind who labored it (or was it mind
content: ood as my body attempted to kill me &amp the mind who labored it (or was it mind strangling the body) having thrown myself from a 4th floor balcony (the only other person to travel the same direction fell from the third floor, and that other person died albeit in One Direction, just the same year as myself); broken ribs and back bones, broken mind &amp soul &amp body--on the goddamn deathbed i was hurtling towards, instead of staving, i knew the stage knew me as i imagined i knew it; so in the bed of my mother, i had pure manic sober joyous giggle fits as i settled from 50+ ideas ranging the global palette and settled on the omni-dromenon-machina as the salve to my most severed strand; thought, it is more than live performance an artist engages in: a writer writes, sets, revises; a musician creates, lives, freezes; and so forth; we intend on performance as the act that completes the cathartic cycle, but there are other parts to that cycle that need tending to; we must be able to stream process, creation, works that don't necessitate performance or performance cometh down thy road; i want to setup environments, algorithmic, which iterate and generate endlessly, a data stream, just a
context: From document: we are at a crossroads, or a speed-bump, or....live performance is… — chunk 2 (chunk 2/3)
